string.text: Game was stopped because of some errors. Please report the last 15 lines of log to the topic on forum AMK-team.ru, Ap-pro.ru or ModDB
The modification can only be launched from \bin\host.exe. If when launching with it your game crashes after the black screen, please read the FAQ supplied in the mods description.
The modification is designed only for 1.6.02 version.
You can't change addons while grenade launcher is active.
This pouch is used to relieve the tactical grip from AS «Val»
The useless part of stalker equipment.
%c[255,255,1,1]RicocheT (LanceW)%c[default] - Founder of mod, animations, work with models, YouTube-channel
%c[255,255,1,1]Translate team%c[default] - Greer, Shizz, BFG, Brigadir and Nikitostalker
%c[255,255,1,1]MadMax%c[default] - models specifically for mod (AK-12, Flamethrower and other)
Flash-Drive with a set of instructions that will help better navigate in this modification. Strongly recommended for inspection! \nSeriously o_O\nPS: Bad english included.

%c[255,1,255,255]Weapon wear%c[default] - all weapons has Max Wear (Resource) parameter, which tells how many shots the weapon can do before his condition falls to zero. Once the condition is lowered to 90% - the weapons have a chance to jam while shooting. Furthermore - it affect on weapon accuracy. Completely worn-out weapons has 300%-accuracy drop. So it makes sense to repair weapons already at around 90%.

%c[255,1,255,255]Trading%c[default] - useless weapons can be sold to stalkers or traders. Price of weapon depends on its condition. Moreover - specialized traders will not buy a weapon with a low condition. However, the Barmen at Skadovsk and Medic at Yanov buy any weapon, but at very low prices. They can take expensive but broken weapons.

%c[255,1,255,255]Repair%c[default] - mechanics can repair weapon with an 140% cost-factor. This means that the repair of weapons below 40% will prove more expensive than buying a new gun. Price of upgrades is not included in repair cost.

%c[255,1,255,255]Slow-Mo%c[default] - can be activated by pressing T (default). It should not be abused: when slow-mo active - player lose stamina and health. Low stamina = health will decrease faster and output will be more painful. Energy drink and medkit can smooth out-effect. If Slow-Mo for some reasons does not work - check out the FAQ.
%c[255,1,255,255]Bipods%c[default] - weapons with bipods can be installed by hold-and-release V button (default) at place where you want to do this.
%c[255,1,255,255]Double scope%c[default] - you can switch the scope if the weapon had two variants of it by pressing Middle Mouse Button (default).
%c[255,1,255,255]Mod console%c[default] - can be activated by U-button (default). Use 'help' and 'list' to see aviable commands (not translated!). You can use it to tweak mod in-game for yourself.
%c[255,1,255,255]Key Binding%c[default] - you can change mod-keys by editing gamedata\scripts\___KEYS.script.

%c[255,1,255,255]Bullet Speed and Recoil%c[default] - than more velocity - than faster and farther bullet can fly. Recoil specifed by two values. The first value - impact by first shot. The second (in round brackets) - increase by each shot.

%c[255,1,255,255]!Bug Reports!%c[default] - if during the game you got crash (usually with beep): first of all - save last 15-20 lines of your log-file (immediately! after crash) Go to mod-thread at ModDB and look for solution, or post your info from log. Enjoy the game. :)

An attachment for your weapon, allows you to keep silent shooting. Reduces the combat qualities of the weapon but helps reduce the recoil. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Hit Power: -20% 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: -50% 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Accuracy: -60% 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil reduction: 50%

A special silencer that changes VSK-94 from an automatic rifle for close quarters combat into a sniper rifle on par with VSS "Vintorez", with the only downside being the damage. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Hit Power: -30% 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Accuracy: +60% 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil reduction: 75%
Tactical grip, for installation only on brown AS «Val». Damped recoil due to a small loss of fire-precision.

A single shot, front loaded, rifled underbarrel grenade launcher for assault rifles made in Warsaw Pact countries. The firing mechanism is self-cocking, with a manual safety catch and automatic shot prevention if incorrectly installed onto a rifle. Uses VOG-25 grenades.

A modified M203 grenade launcher that has been shortened by three inches, attached to weapons by means of a Picatinny Rail. Thanks to a changed mount, this grenade launcher is widely used around the world.
PSO-1 - medium range scope for RU-weapon.
Kobra EKP-1C-03 - close combat scope for RU-weapon.
ACOG TA31RCO-M4 - medium range scope for NATO-weapon.
Eotech 553 - close combat scope for NATO-weapon.
Sight Unit, Small Arms, Trilux - Optical scope for close-medium combat. Only for L85A2.
A 2.7x OTs-14 «Groza» optical scope for urban combat at close range. Attached to weapons by means of a dovetail mount.

OTs-14 «Groza» optical scope with a built-in heat visor used to identify heat sources typical of the human body. Designed for use by special forces. Attached to weapons by means of a dovetail mount. Medium zoom.
An image intensifier night vision OTs-14 «Groza» scope for combat in darkness. Attached to weapons by means of a dovetail mount. Medium zoom.
Usual round without any advantages or disadvantages.

Cheap version of 9x39 mm cartridge. Currently, forbidden to use in official forces, becouse creates high pressure during firing. Which reduces resource of gun. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Hit Power: +10% 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Accuracy: -20%
Sniper cartridge of 9x39 caliber. It was made with high accuracy for reducing of weapon breaking. \n \n%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Barrel wear out two times slower
Standard 12-caliber round filled with twelve buckshot-s. For hunting purposes and large single enemies. Optimal at medium ranges.
Standard 12-caliber round filled with 6 mm shot in a quantity of 32 pieces. Suitable for suppression of enemy groups, or hunt for small targets. Perfect for close combat.
Sub-caliber round with detachable tray. Has good accuracy and cause great damage on hit. Good for long distance.
The balloon with a solution of fuel and parts of fire artefacts which used as analogue for expensive napalm.
Batteries that use a capsulated fragment of the Flash artifact as their power source. Manufactured using hi-tech equipment.
These lower-capacity cells use capsulated fragments of the Flash artifact as their power source. Their lower capacity is due to makeshift production conditions and lack of specialized equipment.
Used in the flare gun, illuminates a large area for 50 seconds.
A USB drive with the launch codes from SBU. Used in the detonator, becomes useless after the rocket launch.

A fragment of an electric artifact, which was charged in anomaly. It is very unstable and in the chance of the casing being damaged lets out all the energy comparable to a hit from electra-anomaly. Used in the Electra Cannon.

Armor-piercing anti-tank grenade which can be used against armored targets and targets behind the shelters.

Although this instance of assault rifle is not released today, can be clearly seen, that previous owner had arms carefully. On the rifle installed non-detacheable ACOG scope, and this gun reassemled for a sniper-shooting. Auto-shoot mode is not provided. On the butt-stock gently cut word «Gunslinger» and 16 small crosses.

This machinegun belonged to Zulus. It’s most noteable features are the expanded ammo box and the longer barrel,which was made to order. The weapon modifications made the gun heavier, but for the previous owner it wasn’t that much of a problem.

Note: A super-accurate hi-tech weapon known as item 62, this rifle was developed in secret laboratories located inside the Zone. The weapon operates by accelerating bullets to extremely high speeds using a system of electromagnets, which provides incredible stopping power with virtually no recoil. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]Penetrates walls%c[default]
An unknown weapon, the firing mechanism of which has not been established. The weapon appears faulty - squeezing the trigger doesn't do anything.
This «thing» was made by local crafters during the X-Mas holidays, after which the schematics spread all over the Zone.

%c[255,1,255,255]Penetrates walls%c[default]
Single shot flare gun, used to fire signal rockets in the sky. Can’t harm or attract monsters.

Stalkers think this is useless, but using the activation codes that were given to you by SBU you can call in a massive rocket strike on the marked area with one of the autonomous silos in the center of the Zone. You can fire it only once. \n\n%c[255,255,1,1][!] %c[default]Explosion radius: 120m.

Hand-crafted weapon, rarely found in use. The radius of destruction give a chance use it for destruction of fortified enemy groups. The created electric "bullet" can't penetrate heavy armor from the first hit, but a couple of shots can cover a huge area within a short timespan. It uses charged up shards of electro artifacts as ammunition.Used for eliminating enemies behind cover. \n%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Damage radius: 14m \n%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire distance: 120m
